headline: A Look At Best Buy (BBY) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Strength
summary: Event context and recent share performance Best Buy (BBY) has drawn attention after recent share price moves, with the stock up about 1.8% over the past day, 10% over the past week, and 6.6% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Best Buy. That recent 10% 7 day share price return has come after a softer year to date share price return of a 3.2% decline, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 13.9% shows income has played an important role.
